notes: The Ghana NIA AWOPA baby-registration service (base https://selfie.imsgh.org:2035) is a private government API with no published OpenAPI or vendor docs. Spec synthesized from the adaptor's public operations and the mock client bundled in the adaptor's dist/index.cjs, which contains the real endpoint path (POST /awopa/api/v1/baby/registration) and verbatim sample request/response bodies. The generic get/post operations accept arbitrary resource paths; only the registration endpoint is modeled in detail. Field names and the source's spelling (e.g. 'timeOfbirth', 'Verifiation') are preserved as they appear in the adaptor.
